title: Third-Party Software Notice
body: NemoClaw deploys OpenClaw into an OpenShell sandbox and may install or run OpenClaw and other third-party software on your behalf.
Before continuing, review the OpenClaw onboarding notice and the official OpenClaw security guidance:
Third-party software, services, and materials are governed by their own terms, conditions, and licenses. By continuing, you acknowledge that you are responsible for reviewing and complying with them.
interactivePrompt: Type 'yes' to accept this third-party software notice and continue [no]:
